description: Your Builder Portal shows assigned Configuration Orders and Build Completions. If it is empty, Plus One has not released a Build to your supplier account yet.
name: Receive an InductOne Build
title: Receive an InductOne Build

description: Open the assigned Configuration Order and use its document index. The release package, manifest, hierarchy workbook, balloon callout report, and builder serial workbook are provided there.
name: Download the release package
title: Download the release package

description: When the physical build is complete, upload the filled builder serial workbook through the Build Completion flow. The upload creates an auditable Build Completion record for Plus One review.
name: Upload the builder serial workbook
title: Upload the builder serial workbook

description: If a completion is rejected, open the rejected Build Completion, read Review Notes, correct the workbook, and submit a new completion. The rejected record remains as audit history.
name: Respond to a rejected Build Completion
title: Respond to a rejected Build Completion
